view.title: Validate persona scenario #1
view.subtitle: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the expected outcome of the persona scenario.

blocks.title: Persona Scenario Validate 1 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the expected outcome of the persona scenario.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the expected outcome of the persona scenario.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires a deterministic validation of the scenario where a customer walks in and checks in under 30 seconds. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific results or traces from this simulation, nor does it confirm whether the scenario behavior was supported or if a failure report was generated. The only related evidence is the summary of the use case, which does not directly address the requirements of this exploratory step.
